finding.summary: True peak is at -0.1 dB, leaving virtually no headroom and risking inter-sample clipping during playback or mix summing.
finding.probable_cause: The isolated kick track has its peak level set too high; no dynamic processing or gain staging is applied to the raw sample.
finding.confidence_reason: Capture is verified isolated, silence fraction is negligible (0.05), and true peak measurement is -0.1 dB, a direct indicator of clipping risk.

evidence_refs.description: Measured true peak of the isolated track at -0.1 dB

proposal.reason: Preview changing track volume from 0.000 dB to -3.000 dB to test whether true_peak_db decreases.
